3268180.name: Gorf the Frog
3268180.description:
GORF the Frog

Jump. Survive. Cross.

In a world filled with dangers and mysteries, embody a lost frog searching for its true purpose. All you know is that you must get to the other side of the road... but is that really all there is to it?

GORF reimagines the classic arcade game Frogger through the lens of modern action RPGs, bringing unprecedented depth to the road-crossing experience with its pixel art aesthetics and uncompromising soulslike gameplay.

KEY FEATURES:

🐸 Strategic Road-Crossing Master the art of survival as you navigate treacherous streets. Plan your route, avoid dangers, and use the environment to your advantage. One mistake could be your last.

⚔️ Brutal Gameplay Face challenging encounters in a souls-like combat system where timing and strategy are key. Learn from your defeats, adapt your approach, and overcome seemingly impossible odds.

🌟 Character Progression Deep RPG systems let you customize your frog's abilities to match your playstyle. Unlock new skills and discover creative ways to tackle increasingly challenging roads.

🤝 Complex World Meet fascinating allies and terrifying enemies in a world where appearances deceive. Trust must be earned, and some of your fiercest opponents might become your strongest allies.

UNCOVER THE TRUTH

What lies behind the seemingly simple task of crossing the road? Why has the world become so dangerous? Uncover the dark secrets behind your journey and face the truth about your destiny.

PREPARE FOR:

  • Diverse environments with unique hazards and challenges

  • Experience-based character progression

  • Extensive locations with alternative paths

  • An engaging story full of unexpected twists

  • Multiple attempts at difficult challenges

  • Epic boss battles that test your skills and wit

  • Gameplay time ranging from 30 minutes to 3 hours

  • Performance-based ranking system with S-tier time ratings and A-tier for other achievements, leading to Perfect Score when maxed out

Do you have enough courage and determination to help the frog discover the truth? Jump, fight, and survive in GORF - where road-crossing becomes an epic life adventure.

GORF is the debut production from an independent studio, combining timeless arcade action with modern game design philosophies.
3268180.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
